description: Style Note Sree kurta for the authentic Desi vibe. Get your summer prints right with this lovely printed piece. Pair it with airy patialas to nail that Punjabi look, or style it with stretchy leggings for all day comfort. We recommend pairing this simply styled kurta with a blingy pair of leggings or chudidhar for a grand occasion. An ethnic pair of chandelier earrings and you're set to go. Product Details Green printed kurta with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, mustard and red paneling on the yoke, three quarter sleeves with paneling at the cuffs and a vented hem Material and Care Blended fabric Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
